core_mechanism: joint likelihood-based (Bayesian) parameter inference that fuses several independent measurement channels into one likelihood to constrain the parameters of a low-dimensional parametric model, yielding parameter confidence intervals and statistical exclusion of competing nested hypotheses
brief_reason: The abstract determines the parameters of a simple parametric (LCDM) model by combining multiple independent datasets (the WMAP power spectra with BAO and H0 distance measurements), reporting each parameter as a central value with a confidence interval and excluding a competing null hypothesis (the scale-invariant spectrum) at 99.5% confidence.
